name: Gingham
description: Picnic-cloth checks woven from two translucent bands — where warp crosses weft the color doubles, and every redraw shifts the weave.

code.style: --warp: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --weft: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --bw: @rand(46%, 62%); --bh: @rand(46%, 62%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; width: 100%; top: 20%; height: var(--bh); background: var(--warp); opacity: 0.5; mix-blend-mode: multiply; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; height: 100%; left: 20%; width: var(--bw); background: var(--weft); opacity: 0.5; mix-blend-mode: multiply; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
